specification_predicate: Input bytes must be valid UTF-8 and must not begin with the UTF-8 BOM (0xEF 0xBB 0xBF).
concrete_artifact_implementation: fn validate_encoding(bytes: &[u8]) -> Result<(), ValidationError> in a lexical module.

specification_predicate: All \r\n sequences must be normalized to \n; bare \r bytes are forbidden.
concrete_artifact_implementation: A normalization homomorphism g applied before parsing. Rejects files with bare \r.

specification_predicate: Every row must have an exact number of fields matching the header row.
New data must be written to a temp file, fsync'ed, then atomically renamed to the target.
concrete_artifact_implementation: A reusable atomic_write_csv(path, bytes) helper function in a csv-core-io module.

specification_predicate: Per-row or per-file checksums (e.g., BLAKE3) can be verified to detect silent corruption.
